Berapa value yang dihasilkan oleh bagian: SELECT currency, SUM(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(net_price, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_net_price FROM z_rfc_trck_sernum WHERE tipe = 'Surabaya' AND process_status = 'PACKING' AND LTRIM(RTRIM(posting_date_packing)) = '2026-03-07' GROUP BY currency ORDER BY currency;

SELECT currency, SUM(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(net_price, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_net_price FROM z_rfc_trck_sernum WHERE tipe = 'Semarang' AND process_status = 'PACKING' AND LTRIM(RTRIM(posting_date_packing)) = '2026-03-07' GROUP BY currency ORDER BY currency;
Berikan saya detail dari total value sel:
SELECT
    LTRIM(RTRIM(posting_date_packing)) AS posting_date,
    currency,
    serialno,
    so_item,
    TRY_CAST(REPLACE(net_price, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS net_price_num
INTO #base_data
FROM z_rfc_trck_sernum
WHERE tipe = 'Surabaya'
  AND process_status = 'PACKING'
  AND TRY_CONVERT(date, LTRIM(RTRIM(posting_date_packing)))
      BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -6, CAST(GETDATE() AS date)) AND CAST(GETDATE() AS date);

SELECT
    posting_date,
    currency,
    SUM(net_price_num) AS total_value
FROM #base_data
GROUP BY
    posting_date,
    currency
ORDER BY
    posting_date,
    currency;

SELECT
    LTRIM(RTRIM(posting_date_packing)) AS posting_date,
    currency,
    serialno,
    so_item,
    TRY_CAST(REPLACE(net_price, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS net_price_num
INTO #base_data
FROM z_rfc_trck_sernum
WHERE tipe = 'Semarang'
  AND process_status = 'PACKING'
  AND TRY_CONVERT(date, LTRIM(RTRIM(posting_date_packing)))
      BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -6, CAST(GETDATE() AS date)) AND CAST(GETDATE() AS date);

SELECT
    posting_date,
    currency,
    SUM(net_price_num) AS total_value
FROM #base_data
GROUP BY
    posting_date,
    currency
ORDER BY
    posting_date,
    currency;

Berikan data kemarin untuk serial number:
SELECT
    so_item,
    serialno,
    material_packing,
    net_price,
    currency
FROM z_rfc_trck_sernum
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(posting_date_packing)) = CONVERT(varchar(10), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 23)
  AND process_status = 'PACKING';

SELECT
    so_item,
    serialno,
    material_packing,
    net_price,
    currency
FROM z_rfc_trck_sernum
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(posting_date_painting)) = CONVERT(varchar(10), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 23)
  AND process_status = 'PAINTING';

SELECT
    so_item,
    serialno,
    material_packing,
    net_price,
    currency
FROM z_rfc_trck_sernum
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(posting_date_assy)) = CONVERT(varchar(10), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 23)
  AND process_status = 'ASSY';
